calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 amend stratified_within_class_temperature 4-arm sweep on SD-056-amended baseline
items.notes: V3-EXQ-614c validates Part (a) of the 2026-06-01 MECH-341 amend (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-616 Sections 7 + 10 contingent-on-614b-FAIL-C1 path). 4-arm sweep stratified_within_class_temperature in {None=legacy, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0} on the SD-056-amended baseline (V3-EXQ-614b ARM_2 ALL_ON config: SP-CEM ON + MECH-341 ON + MECH-313 ON + V_s minimal ON + 5 SD-056 amend flags). Acceptance: C1 ARM_0_LEGACY mean entropy in [0.720, 0.880] (614b ARM_2 ALL_ON 0.800 +/- 10%) on >= 2/3 seeds (regression guard); C2 at least one of {0.5, 1.0, 2.0} mean entropy >= 0.800 on >= 2/3 seeds (within-class lift); C3 frac_pre_ge2 > 0.3 across all 4 arms on >= 2/3 seeds (substrate-readiness). PASS = C1 AND (C2 OR C3). 3 seeds x 4 arms x 90 ep x 200 steps = 216k steps. Cross-plan: same amend transitively unblocks arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l successor cohort) under shared SD-056-amended substrate. NO flip of use_differentiable_cem default (SD-055 safety note preserved). IGW-routed via implement-substrate-mech-341-amend-stratified-temp-ab-probe-20260601T063226Z.

items.title: MECH-090 R-c readiness conjunction (4-arm, C1 baseline redesigned)
items.notes: Supersedes V3-EXQ-592d (FAIL non_contributory 2026-06-01 per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-592d_2026-06-01). 592d C1 baseline predicate (commit_rate = n_commit_entries / total_p2_steps > 0.001) was structurally unmeetable under rv-only ARM_0 entry semantic. 592e applies BOTH autopsy Section 9 fixes orthogonally: (a) FORCE_UNCOMMITTED_P2_ENTRY=True per-episode release of beta_gate + null e3._committed_trajectory + zero _committed_step_idx at P2 episode start so the gate is consulted on every fresh re-elevation; (b) HOLD_RATE_BASED acceptance criteria replacing the unmeasurable commit-rate predicate. Interpretation grid updated: C1 FAIL now routes to /diagnose-errors for SCRIPT predicate correction (NOT curriculum harness, NOT gate -- the 592d grid routing was INVERTED per user gate 2026-06-01T05:55Z). 4 arms x 3 seeds; PASS unblocks commitment_closure:GAP-4 -> done substrate-side. claim_ids=[MECH-090] only per CLAUDE.md claim_ids Accuracy Rule. Cross-link IGW-20260531-021. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T06:38Z (wiring + force-uncommitted per-episode + C1 redesign all verified end-to-end).

items.title: Q-045 MECH-313 + MECH-260 + FP-2 matched-noise on scaffolded_sd054 (GAP-C Theory 3)
items.notes: Closes behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-C Theory 3 (MECH-313 LC-NE tonic noise floor). Supersedes V3-EXQ-603c (FAIL non_contributory 2026-05-27, 8/12 cells aborted P1 survival gate on cold goal pipeline). All three GAP-C substrate prereqs now cleared: (1) MECH-307 default-value recalibration 2026-05-15 by V3-EXQ-540g PASS; (2) goal-pipeline z_goal substrate-readiness 2026-06-01T05:55Z by V3-EXQ-621a PASS on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding; (3) InfantCurriculumScheduler Phase 0->1 H_pos floor recalibration 2026-05-31. 5-arm design extends the 603 4-arm Q-045 grid (ARM_0_both_off / ARM_1_mech313_only / ARM_2_mech260_only / ARM_3_both_on) with ARM_4_matched_noise (FP-2 control: constant T=1.5 selection temperature matched to ARM_1/ARM_3 NoiseFloor lift, no MECH-313 substrate, no MECH-260) to dissociate 'MECH-313 substrate produces diversity' from 'any equivalent-magnitude T lift produces diversity'. P0/P1 phased training delivered via ScaffoldedSD054OnboardingScheduler (P0 reef-refuge spawn + frozen goal pipeline; P1 anneal hazard_food_attraction 0->0.7 + proximity_harm_scale 0.05->0.1 + mech295_min_drive_to_fire 1.0->0.01 + mech307_conjunction_z_beta_threshold 0.6->0.3); custom P2 measurement layers action-class entropy + position-entropy + z_goal_norm peak + reef_visit_fraction + FIFO temporal gate on top of the scheduler's substrate-readiness diagnostics. Acceptance applies the partial 7-criterion gate revision per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-591_2026-05-27 section 7: drop C3 residue_coverage (trivially saturating) + C5/C6/C7 (sentinel-emitting); keep C1 z_goal_norm > 0.4 + C2 rolling H_pos > 0.65*ln(144) ~= 3.23 + C4 action-class entropy lift as discriminative. PASS = C2_q045_mutually_load_bearing AND C4_z_goal_engaged AND C5_h_pos_coverage AND FP2_dissociation. 4-row interpretation grid: PASS -> /governance MECH-313 + MECH-260 promotion review + Q-045 supports + close GAP-C done; PARTIAL_NO_FP2 -> MECH-313 weakens (reduced to uniform-temperature-lift) + Q-045 mixed; SUBSTRATE_FAILURE (C4 OR C5 false) -> /failure-autopsy on V3-EXQ-603d; FAIL_NO_DIVERSITY -> MECH-313/MECH-260/Q-045 weakens. Per-claim direction MANDATORY (evidence_direction_per_claim). Cross-link: behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-C node. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T06:50Z (full P0->P1->P2 pipeline; SD-022 harm_obs_a_dim=7 wiring correct under limb_damage_enabled substrate config). validate_experiments AST contract OK. Initial attempt to commit V3-EXQ-603d via commit 849bec3 included only the script -- the phase3-queue snapshot writer auto-overwrote experiment_queue.json between git-add and git-commit, dropping the entry; re-applied here on top of the new snapshot.

INV-074 retest after MECH-341 parameter retune (entropy_lambda 0.05->0.5, bias_scale 0.1->1.0). V3-EXQ-610a showed FAIL with D1=False D2=False (non_contributory); this retest with amplified diversity signal may show different outcome. IGW-20260601-026.
